lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: I could, but you don't appear to actually need healing right now.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: I am a nelta in service to Ralos.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: We are the faithful servants of Ralos. We serve in a variety of roles across the Church of Ralos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So kind of like a priest?

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: Yes, I believe that would be the closest comparison to the Church of Saradomin, though I am no expert on their practices.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: Above us mere neltas are the teoki, leaders of the key temples across the kingdom. And of course, above them you have the Teokan himself.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: This is the Teomat, home to both the Church of Ralos and the Sect of Ranul. The first and only time that Ralos appeared to us, he did so here on Ralos' Rise. The Teomat was built here as a result.

lines.speaker: Nelta of Ralos
lines.text: May the sun light your way.
